purpose: Normalize branch-topology selection rules at the abstract architecture layer.
default_rules: Prefer parallel_worker when only execution tasks differ and problem definition stays fixed.
Prefer parallel_branch when assumptions or constraints differ but history remains shared.
Prefer serial_branch when strict dependency order dominates.
Prefer suspended_traversal when the path is postponed rather than detached.
Use parallel_fork only when detached history and non-default merge behavior are both real requirements.

current_source_aligned_decisions.reason: No current execution case proves that existing branch classes are insufficient.
